blockers.description: VAL-CROSS-014 requires proof that 10 sequential `agent` calls leave no `/scoops/` or registry growth after each call. Repo search across the likely hardening/nesting/cleanup Vitest files found no existing test that exercises that exact contract.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched the assigned candidate files and the wider `packages/webapp/tests/scoops` tree for `VAL-CROSS-014`, `10 sequential`, `sequential cleanup`, and related phrases; executed the smallest relevant Vitest selection, but none of the passing tests covered the required sequential-10 evidence.
